name: Diabetic Banana Pudding Splits
recipeInstructions:
If Bing cherries are not available, use 4 maraschino cherries.
1. In a blender, process the yogurt on high speed for 30 seconds.
2. Add the pudding mix and process for an additional minute, scraping down sides of the container as necessary.
3. Cut each banana into 6 diagonal slices and sprinkle with lemon juice.
4. Arrange 2 banana quarters into each of 4 goblets or dessert dishes.
5. Top each portion with 1/4 of the pudding mixture.
6. Sprinkle each portion with 1/4 of the pistachios.
7. Finish by topping each portion with 1 tablespoon whipped topping and 1 cherry.
